causalAutopsy.notes: PR #1233 introduced the watchdog's zero watermark without a first-fire baseline; PR #1283 surfaced every re-arm as a user-visible degradation, exposing the latent boot false-positive.

guardEvidence.howCaught: The real self-triggered watchdog timer stays at zero recovery actions during healthy startup; a deliberately lost pre-first-fire interval produces exactly one recovery/report after the positive arm baseline becomes stale, preserving both convergence and liveness.
